tests.test_body:
define i1 @not_decrement_sgt_n1(i8 %x) {
; CHECK-LABEL: @not_decrement_sgt_n1(
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[DEC:%.*]] = add i8 [[X:%.*]], -2
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[OR:%.*]] = or i8 [[DEC]], [[X]]
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[R:%.*]] = icmp sgt i8 [[OR]], -1
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i1 [[R]]
  %dec = add i8 %x, -2
  %or = or i8 %dec, %x
  %r = icmp sgt i8 %or, -1
  ret i1 %r
}

issue.title: [InstCombine] Generalise `((x1 ^ y1) | (x2 ^ y2)) == 0` transform to more than two pairs of variables
issue.author: Kmeakin
